name: Patrick Perez
title: Software Engineer
bio: I am a results-driven Software Engineer with expertise in backend development and a strong foundation in C, C++, Python, and Java, as well as frontend technologies like JavaScript, HTML, and CSS. I specialize in building efficient, scalable, and high-performance applications, with experience in databases, system optimization, and problem-solving. I am currently focused on mastering C# to expand my skill set and take on new challenges in software development.

services.title: Backend Development
services.description: Building efficient, scalable backend systems using C, C++, Python, Node.js, and SQL databases.

services.title: Database Optimization
services.description: Designing and optimizing database structures, improving query performance using Informix SQL, MySQL, and PostgreSQL.

services.title: Web Development
services.description: Creating responsive and dynamic websites using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and backend integrations.

services.title: Software Debugging & Optimization
services.description: Identifying and fixing bugs, memory leaks, and performance bottlenecks to enhance application stability.

services.title: System Integration
services.description: Integrating APIs, third-party services, and legacy systems into modern applications.

services.title: Algorithm & Data Structure Consulting
services.description: Providing optimized solutions using efficient algorithms and data structures.

experience.title: Software Engineer | Fullstack Developer
experience.description: Working on critical banking applications and systems to ensure smooth financial operations.
highlights: Developed and maintained backend applications using C and C++ for banking operations and Java for frontend applications.
Worked on web and batch processing applications.
Performed database operations using Informix SQL, ensuring efficient data retrieval and updates.
Debugged and optimized existing applications to improve performance and resolve overflow issues.
Collaborated with teams to ensure smooth integration of financial systems.

experience.title: Mobile App Developer (Internship)
experience.description: Gained international experience developing mobile applications for tourism.
highlights: Developed and maintained internal tools using Java.
Worked on small-scale web development projects involving JavaScript, HTML, and CSS.
Led the team on frontend and backend development tasks.
Collaborated with team on debugging and optimizing the mobile app.

education.description: Focused on software development, algorithms, and database management.
Emphasized on engineering subjects to pave way for future endeavors.

projects.title: BCN Montjuic Tourist Point Mobile
projects.description: A mobile application designed for BCN Montjuic Tourist Point Inc., helping tourists navigate and access essential services. It enhances the travel experience with an intuitive and user-friendly interface.

projects.title: EcoEye AI
projects.description: An AI-powered web app that identifies plants and animals using image recognition. Perfect for nature enthusiasts, researchers, and students who want quick and accurate identification.

projects.title: Olfactory Machine for UTI Detection
projects.description: A smart device that detects urinary tract infections (UTIs) using gas sensors and a Raspberry Pi. Designed to provide an early warning system for better health monitoring.

projects.title: Super Mega Scatter
projects.description: A fun and engaging mobile game designed for casual entertainment. It features dynamic gameplay and vibrant visuals to keep players entertained.

projects.title: Titan Trade
projects.description: A personal dropshipping website that automates product listing and order management. Ideal for entrepreneurs looking to start an online business with minimal hassle.

projects.title: Smart Dustbin
projects.description: An Arduino-powered smart dustbin that opens automatically when detecting movement. Helps promote hygiene and reduces contact with waste.

projects.title: Lotto AI
projects.description: A lottery number generator that uses AI-based randomization techniques. Designed to help users generate unique number combinations for various lottery games.

projects.title: Djared Web Design
projects.description: A collaborative community web design project that showcases modern UI/UX trends. It serves as an example of responsive and visually appealing web development.

projects.title: Functions in Python
projects.description: A powerful Python-based calculator designed to compute areas, volumes, and centroids. Ideal for students, engineers, and anyone needing precise mathematical calculations.
